title: Twilight Knights
description: Embark on a thrilling journey through the enchanting realm of Twilight Knights, a Minecraft modpack blending the realms of magic, technology, and adventure.
body:
## Description 
Embark on a thrilling journey through the enchanting realm of Twilight Knights, a Minecraft modpack blending the realms of magic, technology, and adventure. Delve into a world brimming with mystical wonders and technological marvels as you uncover ancient secrets, battle fierce foes, and forge your destiny. Harness the power of arcane magic or master advanced machinery to overcome challenges and reshape the land to your will. Will you rise as a legendary hero, or succumb to the shadows that lurk in the twilight?

Modpack for Minecraft 1.12.2 

Lightweight modpack that supports multiplayer with new dimensions, new armour, weapons, classic technology, spells, and more.

This modpack is perfect for those that want a challenging modpack without expert crafting recipes.

![main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d6f88b28d1ee5fa7f412e9f477f45ddec769a72.png)


## Features:
- New Biomes
- New Weapons + Armour
- New Dimensions
- Classic Technology
- Powerful mobs and dungeons
- Magic and spells
- And a lot more!

## Modlist:
